# Full Wizard DNS Interactive Mock — expected output assertions
# Used by tests/full_wizard_interactive_mock.py Test H
#
# The mock flow should produce output that includes:
# - Cloudflare DNS section in Summary
# - dns_profile, dns_plan, dns_check, dns_apply fields
# - dns_apply must NOT be done/installed/verified/success
# - manual_apply_pending or skipped for dns_apply
#
# The mock flow should NOT contain:
# - Authorization header
# - workers.dev
# - hysteria2://
# - tuic://
# - vless://
# - trojan://
#
# The generated profile (under NANOBK_TEST_TMPDIR) must contain:
# - zoneName: example.com
# - nodePrefix: nanobk-node
# - ipv4: 203.0.113.10
# - ipv6: 2001:db8::10
# - defaultProxied: false
# - reserved.panelPrefix: panel
# - reserved.nanokPrefix: nanok
# - reserved.nanobPrefix: nanob
# - file mode: 600
